# RQM Agent Guide (Concise)

- site_identity: RQM Platform documentation (MkDocs Material)
- canonical_docs_url: https://docs.rqmtechnologies.com/
- api_base_url: https://rqm-api.onrender.com
- swagger_url: https://rqm-api.onrender.com/docs

## Platform scope

RQM Platform supports circuit validation, optimization, execution routing, quaternionic/SU(2) math utilities, geometry-native analysis, and RQM Studio workflow orchestration.

## Recommended agent flow

1. Read `/llms.txt`.
2. Read `/agents/`.
3. Read `/agent-contract.json`.
4. Use `/agents/recipes/` for task-specific workflows.
5. Confirm route/schema details in API docs or Swagger before implementation.
6. Produce reproducible payloads, outputs, diffs, or reports.

## Hard constraints

- Use documented API routes and schemas only.
- Validate circuit payloads before optimization.
- Do not treat internal IR (including `u1q`) as a public API contract.
- Do not invent undocumented endpoints or fields.
- Label research content as research.
- Keep production claims conservative and bounded to documented behavior.
